game.title: Nieve
game.story_connection: Coco and Mango experience snow for the first time and want to catch as many snowflakes as possible

mechanics.core_loop: Move Coco left/right to catch falling snowflakes, avoid sun rays that melt your snow count

controls.drag_or_touch: Move Coco horizontally to position under snowflakes
controls.tap_sides: Alternative: tap left/right side of screen to move in that direction

states.playing: Active gameplay, items falling from sky
states.shielded: Protected from sun rays (after hot chocolate)
states.ended: Show GameEndScreen with final snow count and stars

scoring.goal: Collect as many snowflakes as possible in 60 seconds

visuals.background: Winter scene gradient (white/light blue), snow-covered ground at bottom
visuals.character: Coco with winter hat/scarf, holding a bucket or hands up to catch
visuals.snowflakes: CSS animated snowflakes with slight drift
visuals.sun_rays: Yellow beams that pulse/glow as warning

instructions_text: ¡Atrapa los copos de nieve! Evita los rayos de sol que derriten tu nieve.
implementation_notes: Coco moves along bottom of screen only (horizontal)
Items spawn at random X positions at top, fall down
Collision detection: item Y reaches Coco's Y and X overlaps
Snow count display shows current score
Optional: snow accumulates visually as you collect more
